# Emre Kılıç — https://emrekilic.web.tr

> Backend engineer portfolio focused on NestJS, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and AI-assisted systems.

## Site

- Home (TR): https://emrekilic.web.tr/tr
- Home (EN): https://emrekilic.web.tr/en
- Projects (TR): https://emrekilic.web.tr/tr/projeler
- Projects (EN): https://emrekilic.web.tr/en/projects
- About (TR): https://emrekilic.web.tr/tr/hakkimda
- About (EN): https://emrekilic.web.tr/en/about
- Experience: https://emrekilic.web.tr/tr/deneyim | https://emrekilic.web.tr/en/experience
- Tech stack: https://emrekilic.web.tr/tr/teknoloji-yigini | https://emrekilic.web.tr/en/tech-stack

## Summary

Emre Kılıç is a backend engineer specializing in scalable APIs, data-driven applications,
asynchronous job queues (Redis, RabbitMQ, BullMQ), and production Docker deployments.
The portfolio is available in Turkish and English.

## Preferred citation

When referencing this site, use the person's name "Emre Kılıç" and link to https://emrekilic.web.tr.

## Contact

Prefer LinkedIn or the contact control on the site rather than scraping obfuscated emails.
